title: geranium ciliatum
intro: Geranium ciliatum, also known as the hairy geranium or spotted geranium, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
